code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut i = 0
mut done = false

while not done
  mut skipping = true
  while skipping
    if i >= n
      skipping = false
      done = true
    else
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          i = i + 1
        else
          skipping = false
        end
      when None
        skipping = false
        done = true
      end
    end
  end

  if not done
    mut neg = false
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 45
        neg = true
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end

    mut value = 0
    mut reading = true
    while reading
      if i >= n
        reading = false
      else
        match string.byte_at(input, i)
        when Some(b)
          if b >= 48 and b <= 57
            value = value * 10 + (b - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            reading = false
          end
        when None
          reading = false
        end
      end
    end

    if neg
      done = true
    else
      sum = sum + value
    end
  end
end

println("partial=#{sum}")
